name: Rinkhals apps
description: 3rd party apps for Rinkhals custom firmware

cloud2lan-bridge.name: Cloud to LAN bridge
cloud2lan-bridge.description: Enable most Cloud features to still work even when LAN mode is enabled. This app will bridge all Cloud messages to the LAN, enabling control from Anycubic apps in LAN mode. It will only work if LAN mode is enabled

cloudflare-tunnel.name: Cloudflare Tunnel
cloudflare-tunnel.description: Manages Cloudflare tunnels for remote access to the printer

discovery-helper.name: Discovery helper
discovery-helper.description: Improves LAN mode discovery of the printer in Anycubic Slicer Next

example.name: Example app
example.description: Simple example app to showcase the app system

nfs-mount.name: NFS Mount
nfs-mount.description: Replace local gcode storage with NFS to offload I/O

octoapp.name: OctoApp companion
octoapp.description: Companion for the OctoApp mobile application

octoeverywhere.name: OctoEverywhere
octoeverywhere.description: A maker community project that enables free remote access, AI failure detection, print notifications, live streaming and more.

tailscale.name: Tailscale
tailscale.description: Secure, private network connectivity using Tailscale VPN
